channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: NVIDIA's Flexible AI Factories Tackle U.S. Power Grid Crisis
item.description:
NVIDIA and Emerald AI partner with AES and Constellation to deploy flexible AI factories as grid assets, tackling America's growing energy bottleneck.

Key points:
• NVIDIA and Emerald AI announced a collaboration with six major energy firms — AES, Constellation, Invenergy, NextEra Energy, Nscale Energy & Power, and Vistra — to build a new class of AI factories that operate as flexible grid assets.
• The factories use NVIDIA's Vera Rubin DSX reference design and the DSX Flex software library, allowing AI workloads to ramp power usage up or down in response to real-time grid conditions.
• The initiative could unlock up to 100 GW of flexible capacity across the U.S. power system, helping address peak demand rather than requiring entirely new energy supply.
• DSX Flex is set to be deployed at commercial scale later in 2026 at NVIDIA's Virginia AI Factory Research Center, one of the first power-flexible AI factories built to this standard.

Read the full article: NVIDIA's Flexible AI Factories Tackle U.S. Power Grid Crisis

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
